content:
Welcome to our comprehensive guide on OpenClaw’s UGC-Manual skill, a powerful tool for content creators. In this article, we’ll explore how this skill transforms images and audio into realistic lip-sync videos, making it ideal for personalized video content creation.

Skill can be found at: https://github.com/openclaw/skills/tree/main/skills/pauldelavallaz/ugc-manual/SKILL.md
excerpt: Learn how OpenClaw’s UGC-Manual skill generates realistic lip-sync videos from user-provided images and audio recordings.
title: Understanding OpenClaw’s UGC-Manual Skill: Custom Lip-sync Video Creation
